title: Backend Developer Vacancy at LG Soft India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at LG Soft India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at LG Soft India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About LG Soft India:
LG Soft India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India!
